title: Vehicle Market Surveillance Unit emissions testing results, 2024
body: "This report provides results from the 33 vehicles tested in the 2023 vehicle emissions testing programme.  This included:   diesel cars petrol cars light vans plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (PHEV) hybrid cars (also known as self-charging hybrid cars) heavy goods vehicles (HGVs) public service vehicles (PSVs)   They’re carried out by the Vehicle Market Surveillance Unit, part of the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency.  "
